aml.title: AML Screening
aml.page_subtitle: Watchlist management, hit review, and screening history
aml.feature_disabled: AML live screening is not enabled in this environment.
aml.summary_card_aria: AML compliance summary — click to view details
aml.watchlists_empty_body: Load OFAC, EU, or UN watchlists to begin AML screening.
aml.watchlist_refresh_confirm_body: This will re-download and reload all watchlists from source and re-screen all customers. This may take several minutes.
aml.watchlist_slow: Watchlist refresh is taking longer than expected.
aml.hits_empty_body: All AML hits have been reviewed or no screenings have flagged matches.
aml.slow_loading: This is taking longer than expected.
aml.pending_30s_hint: Screening still running — refresh to check progress.
aml.decide_cleared_desc: Verified — not a true match. Customer may proceed.
aml.decide_escalated_desc: Requires further review by the LAC compliance team.
aml.decide_blocked_desc: Confirmed match — customer access suspended pending review.
aml.decide_notes_required: Notes are required when escalating or blocking.
aml.screenings_empty_body: Screenings appear here after customers are created or updated.
aml.no_hits_detail: No hits recorded for this screening.
aml.error_network: Network error. Check connection and retry.
aml.error_forbidden: You do not have permission to view this. Compliance role required.
aml.error_forbidden_decide: Compliance role required to decide hits.
aml.error_server: A server error occurred. Our team has been notified.
aml.error_conflict: This record was recently updated. Refresh to see the latest state.
aml.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
aml.error_invalid_threshold: Threshold must be a number between 0 and 1.

doctype.autofill_floor_hint: Fields below this confidence won't auto-fill into Capture.
doctype.confidence_high_hint: Fields above this skip the 'verify' pill in Capture.
doctype.preview_empty_no_samples: No samples uploaded. Upload samples to preview extraction.
doctype.preview_empty_no_selection: Select a sample above to preview extraction.
doctype.preview_sample_not_found: Sample not available. Select a different sample.
doctype.error_autofill_exceeds_high: Autofill floor cannot exceed high confidence.
doctype.error_forbidden: You don't have permission to change thresholds. Doc Admin role required.
doctype.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
doctype.error_concurrent: This document type was updated by another user.
doctype.feature_disabled: Confidence tuning is not enabled in this environment.
